title: lippia javanica
intro: Lippia javanica, also known as Java tea or Mexican oregano, is a plant species native to Southeast Asia and the Pacific islands, belonging to the family Verbenaceae. Its leaves and flowers are rich in antioxidants and possess antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties, making it a valuable medicinal herb. The health benefits of Lippia javanica include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In traditional medicine, Lippia javanica is often prepared as a tea by infusing the leaves in hot water, and it can also be used in herbal infusions, tinctures, and topical creams to harness its medicinal properties.
